name: Battalion Banner
description: Notes Identical in stats to the Oryxmas Ornament: Exposed, this accessory also places a banner that grants Damaging in its radius. This is a significant buff towards damage outupt.
effects: On Ability Use: Summons a banner which deals 400-600 damage each second within 6 tiles and grants Damaging to players within 3 tiles. Duration: 4 seconds Cooldown: 10 seconds Damaging Duration: 0.6 Damaging Cooldown: 0.2
